reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza.  Tienen 6 bombas y sólo 2 en funcionamiento.  El empleado carga lento. Hemos estado 30 min haciendo fila para cargar.. una vergüenza en un lugar turístico perder el tiempo y faltarle el respeto al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace. They have six pumps, but only two are working. The employee is incredibly slow. We've been queuing for 30 minutes to fill up... it's shameful to waste time and disrespect customers in a tourist area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdF9Pc3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Un solo surtidor habilitado y te hacen hacer la fila de espera en plena avenida. Los turistas se pelean en la calle, porque no saben de este pésimo sistema y sin querer se colan entre ellos. Un peligro en todos los sentidos. Debería la policía de tránsito ordenar y multar a la estación. Y pueden tener más surtidores habilitados sin problema. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Only one pump is working, and they make you wait in line right in the middle of the avenue. Tourists are fighting in the street because they don't know about this awful system and accidentally cut in line. It's dangerous in every way. The traffic police should regulate the station and fine them. And they can have more pumps working without any problem. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcDYtcDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
1 solo playero para atender. Una hora de cola. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
Only one attendant to serve. An hour's wait. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcF83NnVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Pero no entiendo porque hay un cartel de prohibido usar el celular al lado de otro que dice que escanees un código QR con tu celular para pagar. Se contradicen

(Translated by Google)
Good service. But I don't understand why there's a sign prohibiting cell phone use next to another one saying to scan a QR code with your phone to pay. They contradict each other.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtLTRueS13RRAB
